languages.text: "Конечно же, Лорд-капитан. Династии требуется доход для поддержания протектората. Было бы глупо упускать такую возможность".
"Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."
languages.original_text: "Конечно же, Лорд-капитан. Династии требуется доход для поддержания протектората. Было бы глупо упускать такую возможность".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."
"Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."
"Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

languages.text: 「もちろん、キャプテン様。王朝は保護領を維持するために収入が必要です。このような機会を逃すのは愚かです」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん、キャプテン様。王朝は保護領を維持するために収入が必要です。このような機会を逃すのは愚かです。」

languages.text: «Por supuesto, Lord Capitán. La dinastía necesita ingresos para mantener el protectorado. Sería una necedad dejar pasar esta oportunidad».
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: «Por supuesto, Lord Capitán. La dinastía necesita ingresos para mantener el protectorado. Sería una necedad dejar pasar esta oportunidad».

languages.text: “当然，舰长大人。王朝需要收入来维持属地，错过这样的机会实属不智。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: “当然，舰长大人。王朝需要收入来维持属地，错过这样的机会实属不智。”

languages.text: "Natürlich, Lord Captain. Die Dynastie braucht Einkünfte für den Erhalt des Protektorats. Es wäre dumm, sich eine solche Gelegenheit entgehen zu lassen."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich, Lord Captain. Die Dynastie braucht Einkünfte für den Erhalt des Protektorats. Es wäre dumm, sich eine solche Gelegenheit entgehen zu lassen."

languages.text: "Elbette Lord Kaptan. Hanedanlığın protektorayı sürdürmek için gelire ihtiyacı var. Böyle bir fırsatı kaçırmak aptallık olur."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette Lord Kaptan. Hanedanlığın protektorayı sürdürmek için gelire ihtiyacı var. Böyle bir fırsatı kaçırmak aptallık olur."

languages.text: « Bien sûr, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. La dynastie a besoin de ressources pour maintenir le protectorat. Il serait insensé de laisser passer une telle occasion. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. La dynastie a besoin de ressources pour maintenir le protectorat. Il serait insensé de laisser passer une telle occasion. »
